violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outsides of some of the equipment in the kitchen including the fry dump coolers and cooking equipment noted not clean.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen under equipment and along walls noted in need of cleaning. Floor sinks noted in need of cleaning. Walls around 3-compartment sink and next to soda pop boxes noted in need of cleaning.
